# AQuickDraft

> Agreement templates for game developers, technical folks, and college students.

AQuickDraft (https://www.aquickdraft.com) helps indie developers, technical collaborators, and students draft affordable agreement templates. Drafting and reading the full agreement are free. Pay $5 per document to edit a saved draft, download a PDF, or share a read-only link.

## Important

- Documents are **templates only** — not crafted, reviewed, or created by lawyers.
- Users should read through agreements carefully before presenting them to others.
- Not a substitute for professional legal advice.

## Audience

- Game developers (revenue splits with artists, contractors, co-devs)
- Technical folks (side projects, freelance collaborations)
- College students (class projects, club startups)

## Agreement types

- Revenue sharing: https://www.aquickdraft.com/templates/revenue-sharing
- Profit sharing: https://www.aquickdraft.com/templates/profit-sharing
- Commission: https://www.aquickdraft.com/templates/commission
- NDA: https://www.aquickdraft.com/templates/nda

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.aquickdraft.com/
- Guide: https://www.aquickdraft.com/guide
- FAQ: https://www.aquickdraft.com/faq
- Pricing: https://www.aquickdraft.com/pricing
- About: https://www.aquickdraft.com/about
- Contact: https://www.aquickdraft.com/contact

## Pricing

- Free: drafting and reading the full agreement
- $5: unlock editing for a saved draft
- $5: PDF download per document
- $5: shareable read-only link per document
